\tzpentry{ID5801}{Wavefunction Evolution Equation}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID5801 introduces Wavefunction Evolution Equation as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\begin{equation} \tan[\psi(r)] = \frac{r}{v_{\text{pattern}}} \left|\frac{\partial\Omega}{\partial r}\right| \sqrt{1 - \frac{r_s}{r}} \left(1 + \frac{a^2}{r^2}\right)^{1/4} \end{equation}
